strings.panel.p1.bubble.left.html: So you'd really kill me, your own brother?
strings.panel.p1.bubble.right.html: Maybe. But first, I hafta try to turn you to the dark side.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.right.html: Join me, and we will rule my multinational corporation with evil! Mwa ha ha!
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: You have the urge to do some accounting...
strings.panel.p4.bubble.left.html: ...I have the urge to do some accounting.
